inputs.label: Trade Size (Lots)
inputs.businessContext: Trade size in standard lots (1 lot = 100,000 units typically)

businessContext_i18n.en: Trade size in standard lots (1 lot = 100,000 units typically)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Standart lot cinsinden işlem büyüklüğü (1 lot = genellikle 100.000 birim)
businessContext_i18n.de: Handelsgröße in Standard-Lots (1 Lot = 100.000 Einheiten typischerweise)

inputs.label: Contract Size (Units per Lot)
inputs.businessContext: Number of base currency units per standard lot

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of base currency units per standard lot
businessContext_i18n.tr: Standart lot başına baz para birimi sayısı

inputs.label: Pip Size (Quote Currency)
inputs.businessContext: Pip definition in quote currency (e.g., 0.0001 for most pairs, 0.01 for JPY pairs)

businessContext_i18n.en: Pip definition in quote currency (e.g., 0.0001 for most pairs, 0.01 for JPY pairs)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Karşıt para biriminde pip tanımı (ör. çoğu parite için 0.0001, JPY pariteleri için 0.01)
businessContext_i18n.de: Pip-Definition in Kurswährung (z. B. 0,0001 für die meisten Paare, 0,01 für JPY-Paare)

inputs.label: Quote to Account Currency Rate
inputs.businessContext: Exchange rate from quote currency to account currency (amount of account currency per 1 unit of quote currency)

label_i18n.tr: Karşıt Para Biriminden Hesap Para Birimine Kur

businessContext_i18n.en: Exchange rate from quote currency to account currency (amount of account currency per 1 unit of quote currency)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Karşıt para biriminden hesap para birimine döviz kuru (1 birim karşıt para birimi başına hesap para birimi miktarı)
businessContext_i18n.de: Wechselkurs von Kurswährung zu Kontowährung (Betrag der Kontowährung pro 1 Einheit Kurswährung)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
